content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative feedback framework can be augmented with multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid refinement system that eliminates blind spots in unguided self-improvement without requiring additional training or labeled data. This hybrid approach would allow LLMs to catch flaws an initial single self-feedback pass would miss, while retaining Self-Refine’s core advantage of being training-free.
